hero_announcement.body: Planning a team or group day on the mountain? I run private sessions all winter.

home.hero_sub: Private snowboard lessons with a true obsessive — I'll enjoy your progress as much as you do.
home.intro_title: I don't just teach snowboarding. I live it.
home.intro_body: Most schools hand you an instructor. The Drop is me — one certified rider who has spent a lifetime on the mountain and still gets the same rush dropping in. I read how you ride, fix what's holding you back, and get you carving lines you didn't think were yours. Your progress is my favourite part of the day.
home.classes_title: Four ways to ride with me
home.classes_sub: Private, 1 to 4 people. Pick the time that fits — I handle the rest. Lift pass and gear aren't included; I'll point you to the rental.
home.class_blurb_oneHour: Fix one thing, or get your nerve back. One focused hour, just the two of us.
home.class_blurb_twoHours: Your first day on snow — or your next breakthrough. Video feedback to take home.
home.class_blurb_intensive: Go deep on freestyle or carving. Live video coaching, and yours to keep.
home.class_blurb_fullDay: The whole mountain — your choice of resort across northern Switzerland.
home.instructor_body: I learnt the way you will — falling, laughing, chasing that one clean turn until it clicked. Now I coach the way I wish I'd been taught: patient, honest, and genuinely fired up when you land it. Beginners welcome from age 8.
home.reviews_title: What they say after a day on the snow
home.review_1_quote: I had an amazing experience learning to snowboard with Javi! As a complete beginner I was pretty nervous at first, but he made the whole process feel fun and manageable from the start. He was very attentive, always making sure I felt safe and understood each step before moving on. He shared great tips and tricks that helped me improve quickly, and his encouragement really built my confidence on the board. If you're looking for an instructor who is motivating and genuinely committed to helping you improve, I highly recommend Javi. Thank you for making my first snowboarding experience such a great one!
home.review_2_quote: I hadn't been able to improve my snowboarding for a long time and was close to giving up. Booking a lesson with Javi was the best decision I could have made. He's incredibly skilled and really focused on helping you refine your technique and understand how to correct your mistakes. I already feel more confident, and I can't wait to get back on the slopes!
home.review_3_quote: Javi is an excellent snowboard instructor. We were two complete beginners stepping onto a board for the first time. Thanks to his patient, motivating and positive attitude, we felt comfortable from the very start. He explained the most important fundamentals clearly and kept us motivated. We had so much fun and recommend him without a doubt. Thank you! Anna & Fito ❤️‍🔥
home.review_4_quote: Had my first class with Javi and was incredibly surprised by the support and the attention to detail on my mistakes — the ones that could lead to bad habits. It was super!

terms.metadata_description: General terms and conditions for private snowboard lessons booked at The Drop.
terms.heading: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: These terms govern bookings made on rideflumserberg.ch. By confirming a booking you accept them in full.
terms.section_prices_body: All prices are in CHF, inclusive of 0% VAT — the school operates below the CHF 100,000 annual turnover threshold. Rates switch to VAT-inclusive 8.1% automatically once the threshold is crossed; the displayed total at checkout always reflects the rate that applies.
terms.section_lessons_body: Lessons take place in all weathers. The only exceptions are extreme conditions when the cable cars are not in operation, when slopes are closed by the resort, or when avalanche risk has been declared unsafe by the local patrol.
terms.section_insurance_body: No liability is accepted for accidents during or outside snow-sports lessons. Insurance is the participant's responsibility. We strongly recommend a Swiss accident insurance with snow-sports coverage and a third-party liability policy.
terms.section_registration_body: All registrations are binding from the moment payment is confirmed. Slots are allocated in the order payments are received. If a slot becomes oversubscribed for reasons outside our control, the latest booking is refunded in full at no charge.
terms.section_cancellation_customer_body: You may cancel at least 48 hours before the lesson start and receive a credit valid for one year, redeemable against any future lesson. Cancellations made less than 48 hours before the lesson, and no-shows, forfeit the lesson fee.
terms.section_cancellation_customer_exception: Exception — in the event of an accident or illness on presentation of a medical certificate, a credit will be issued at our discretion regardless of the cancellation window. Contact us by phone or email as soon as you can.
terms.section_cancellation_school_body: When we cancel a lesson — because the cable cars are not in operation, the slopes are closed, the avalanche risk is unsafe, or the instructor cannot be replaced — you may either rebook to another date at no charge or request a cash refund to the original payment method. Stripe processes the refund within five to ten working days depending on your bank.
terms.section_ski_tickets_body: Ski tickets are not included in lesson prices. The participant is responsible for purchasing a valid ski-area pass for Flumserberg before the lesson starts.
terms.section_jurisdiction_body: The exclusive place of jurisdiction is Mels (Sarganserland, canton of St. Gallen, Switzerland). Swiss federal law applies.

privacy.metadata_description: How The Drop collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what personal data we collect when you book a lesson, who processes it on our behalf, and how to exercise your rights under the Swiss nFADP and the EU GDPR.
privacy.section_controller_body: The Drop, the website operator. Contact: franciscojgonzalezfernandez@gmail.com. Operating from Flumserberg, canton of St. Gallen, Switzerland.
privacy.section_data_body: Name, email address, phone number and the data required to complete payment. Card details are handled directly by Stripe and never reach our servers. We also store a session cookie issued by our authentication library; it is strictly necessary to keep you signed in and contains no tracking information.
privacy.section_processors_body: Stripe (payments, in Ireland and the United States), Resend (transactional email, in the United States and the European Union), Sentry (error monitoring, in the European Union), Vercel (hosting and cookieless analytics, primarily in the European Union), Neon (Postgres database, in the European Union) and Google (calendar synchronisation for instructors who opt in). Each provider acts as a processor bound by a data-processing agreement.
privacy.section_retention_body: Account and booking data are retained while your account is active. Payment and invoicing metadata are retained for ten years to satisfy Swiss accounting law (Code of Obligations, Art. 957a). On account deletion we erase personal identifiers from booking history but keep the anonymised accounting record.
privacy.section_rights_body: You may at any time request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data. Under the Swiss nFADP and the EU GDPR you also have the right to data portability and the right to object to processing. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.section_contact_body: To exercise these rights or to raise any privacy-related question, write to franciscojgonzalezfernandez@gmail.com. If you believe your rights have been infringed, you may also lodge a complaint with the Swiss Federal Data Protection and Information Commissioner (FDPIC).

login.heading: Sign in
login.sub: Email and password, magic link, or Google.
login.magic_sent: Check your inbox for the sign-in link. It expires shortly.
login.error_magic_link_delivery_failed: Could not send the sign-in email. Please try again in a moment.

dirty.title: Discard payment to edit?
dirty.body: We'll cancel the in-flight payment so you can change the booking. Your booker details stay filled in.
dirty.error_unauthorized: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
dirty.error_not_found: We could not find the active booking.
dirty.error_forbidden: This booking is on a different account.
dirty.error_pi_not_cancelable: Payment is already in motion. Wait for the confirmation or refund email before editing.
dirty.error_stripe_error: Could not reach the payment provider. Try again in a moment.

step1.metadata_title: Reserve a lesson — Snowboard Booking Platform
step1.heading: Reserve a lesson
step1.sub: Tell us how long you want to ride. You'll pick a date, an instructor and the lesson language on the next steps.

step2.metadata_title: Pick a date — Snowboard Booking Platform
step2.heading: Pick a date
step2.sub: Solid days have at least one instructor available. Tap a quiet day to see the closest openings.
step2.nearby_intro: Nothing open on {date}. Closest dates with availability:
step2.nearby_empty: No nearby openings within two weeks. Try a different month.

step3.metadata_title: Pick a time and instructor — Snowboard Booking Platform
step3.heading: Pick a time and instructor
step3.anyone_sub_assigned: We'll match you with {name} — the instructor with the lightest day. Pick one below if you'd rather choose.
step3.anyone_sub_none: No instructor available at this time.
step3.language_sub: {name} can teach in any of the languages below. The default is their primary.

step4.heading: Tell us who's riding
step4.sub: We just need the booker's contact and a quick profile for every rider.
step4.anonymous_body: Bookings are tied to your account so we can email confirmations and keep your history. It takes a moment — email & password, magic link, or Google.
step4.booker_email_hint: Linked to your account. Change it by signing in with a different email.
step4.booker_phone_hint: International format, used only if we need to reach you about this booking.
step4.attendees_sub: Between one and four riders per booking. Add another if you're booking for the group.
step4.notes_placeholder: Goals, injuries, gear, anything that helps us tailor the lesson.
step4.terms_label_prefix: I have read and accept the
step4.credits_sub: Apply your account credits to this lesson.
step4.error_phone_invalid: Enter a valid international phone number (e.g. +41 76 638 1870)
step4.error_credit_not_applicable: One of the selected credits is no longer available. We've cleared your selection — please review and try again.
step4.error_invalid_fields: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
step4.error_fallback: Could not continue. Check the highlighted fields and try again.

step5.heading: Confirm and pay
step5.sub: Card, TWINT, Apple Pay or Google Pay — choose your method below.
step5.error_declined: Your bank declined the payment. Try a different card or method.
step5.error_authentication: Authentication failed. Try again or pick a different method.
step5.error_timeout: The payment took too long to confirm. Check your bank app and try again.
step5.error_fallback: Could not process the payment. Try again in a moment.
step5.error_slot_taken_body: Someone else booked this time while you were filling the form. Pick another date to keep going.
step5.error_unauthorized_body: Sign in again to complete the booking.
step5.error_invalid_body: We could not validate the booking details. Go back to Step 4 and check the form.
step5.error_pricing_body: Please contact us — the lesson price for this duration is not set up. We'll fix it immediately.

resume.metadata_title: Complete your payment — Snowboard Booking Platform
resume.heading: Finish where you left off
resume.sub: Your reservation is held for 15 minutes after checkout. Pay now and we'll send the confirmation right away.
resume.vat_note: CHF, VAT included. You'll receive a receipt by email.

exito.body_confirmed: We've emailed the details and a calendar invite. See you on the mountain.
exito.body_pending: Stripe is still processing the payment. This page refreshes when it's done.
exito.body_pending_fallback: Still working on it. Refresh manually if nothing changes in a minute.
exito.body_failed: Try again or pick a different method.
exito.forbidden_body: This booking belongs to a different account. Sign in with the email you used to book it.

dashboard.heading: Your bookings
dashboard.sub: Confirmed, completed and cancelled lessons — all in one place.
dashboard.tab_count_label: {label}, {count, plural, =0 {no bookings} one {# booking} other {# bookings}}
dashboard.empty_pending: No payments waiting. Reservations only show up here in the 15 minutes after checkout if the payment was not completed.
dashboard.empty_upcoming: No upcoming lessons. Reserve a slot and it will show up here with the date, instructor and receipt.

cancel.body_credit: You're cancelling more than 48 hours before the lesson. You'll receive a {amount} credit valid for one year. The credit can be applied to any future booking at checkout.
cancel.body_forfeit: You're cancelling less than 48 hours before the lesson. Per our policy, no refund or credit will be issued. If there's an exception (illness, family emergency), please call us before confirming: {phone}.
cancel.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

pricing.metadata_title: Snowboard lessons & prices — The Drop, Flumserberg
pricing.metadata_description: Private snowboard lessons in Flumserberg with Javi: one hour to a full day, flat price for up to four riders, in English, German or Spanish. From age 8.
pricing.heading: Pick how long we ride.
pricing.intro: Four ways to ride with me. Choose the one that fits where you are — the price is the same whether you come solo or bring three friends.

oneHour.name: 1-hour snowboard lesson
oneHour.blurb: Fix one thing, or get your nerve back. One focused hour, just us.
points: One flaw, sorted — the toe edge, that heel chatter, whatever's nagging you.
Nervous about a steeper run? That's exactly what this hour is for.
Off the board for a while? The fastest way back onto it.

twoHours.name: 2-hour snowboard lesson
twoHours.blurb: Your first day, or the basics done right. Enough time for it to actually click.
points: First time on a board? You'll leave linking your turns.
Already know the basics? A proper technical tune-up.
Two hours is where the fundamentals settle in.
twoHours.perk: Past the beginner stage? I'll film you and send the clips to your phone after.

intensive.name: 4-hour intensive lesson
intensive.blurb: Freestyle or carving — four hours to actually change how you ride.
points: Pick your line: freestyle in the park, or carving hard turns.
Drills that stick, not just laps for the sake of it.
I film you as we go, and send it to your phone after.
intensive.meeting: a meeting point we pick together

fullDay.name: Full-day snowboard lesson
fullDay.blurb: Everything the intensive is, with the whole mountain and time to breathe.
points: All of the 4-hour intensive — freestyle or carving, filmed.
Choose the resort: we can ride other spots in the canton of St. Gallen (sorted with me first).
A real 30–45 minute break to refuel.
fullDay.meeting: a meeting point we pick together

included.title: Good to know
included.lift_pass: The lift pass isn't included — you buy your own day pass. I'll point you to the right counter.
included.beginner_zone: Just starting out? We stay in the beginner zone — it's free, so you won't need a lift pass at all.
included.gear: Gear isn't included either. You can rent a board and boots at the resort, and I can help by pointing you to a few shops.
included.video: After class I send your video over WhatsApp.

empty.title: Prices are between seasons.
empty.body: I'm setting up this season's lessons right now. Check back soon — the new dates are coming.

instructors.metadata_description: Meet the snowboard instructors at The Drop in Flumserberg — the languages they speak, what they love riding, and how to book a lesson.
instructors.heading: Who you'll ride with
instructors.intro: One school, real people. See who teaches, the languages they speak, and what they love riding — before you book.
instructors.profile_metadata_description: {name} teaches snowboarding at The Drop in Flumserberg. Languages, specialties, and how to book a lesson.

about.metadata_description: The Drop is one rider who coaches in Flumserberg. The story behind the name, how I learned, and why I want more people on a board.
about.hero_image_alt: Javi standing on a groomed run at Flumserberg in full snowboard kit.
about.heading: I'm <name>Javi</name>. The Drop is just me and a board.
about.lede: By day I write software. The rest of the time I'm on the mountain — because snowboarding is the thing that pulls the best out of me, and out of everyone I get to ride with.
about.name_body_1: I started this around one thing snowboarding does for me: it quiets a restless, hyperactive head better than anything else. On a board I get clarity, calm, a kind of pure focus — and I've watched it pull the best out of everyone who rides. I want that within reach of as many people as possible.
about.name_body_2: The drop itself is the half-second before you commit to a line or a feature that scares you — the breath where you let everything else fall away and it's just you and the board. That moment is the whole point. The name comes straight from it.
about.me_body_1: I'm a certified coach from Spain with several years teaching both adults and kids — from first turns to carving and freestyle.
about.me_body_2: Kids get an experience built on how much I love riding with them. And an engineer's head means that when an adult wants to understand why a turn actually works, I can explain it.
about.video_caption: Me, somewhere on the hill. (Real clip drops in here soon.)
about.philosophy_title: What a lesson with me is actually about
about.philosophy_body: It's built on confidence. The part I love most is watching someone face down a fear they walked in with — so we build that trust a step at a time, keeping every session safe and genuinely fun.
about.mountain_body: It's the first mountain I worked on as an instructor in Switzerland, and it's easy to reach from Zürich and St. Gallen. Best of all, the beginner area is free and open to everyone — no excuse not to start.

faq.metadata_title: FAQ — snowboard lessons in Flumserberg | The Drop
faq.metadata_description: Lift pass, gear, age limits, languages, cancellation and what to bring — everything you need to know before booking a private snowboard lesson in Flumserberg with The Drop.
faq.heading: Questions, answered.
faq.intro: The things people ask me most — gear, age, languages, weather, what happens if plans change. If something's still unclear, just call.

items.a: No — you buy your own day pass, and I'll point you to the right counter when we meet. The one exception is complete beginners: we stay in the free beginner zone, so you won't need a pass at all.

items.q: Do I need my own gear?
items.a: Bring warm layers, gloves and goggles if you have them. The board and boots aren't included — you rent them at the resort, and I'm happy to point you to a few shops I trust.
Eight, for kids and adults alike. If you're booking for a younger child, call me first and we'll talk it through.

items.q: Which languages do you teach in?
items.a: English, German and Spanish — all native or fluent. Tell me your preference when you book and the whole lesson runs in that language.

Any. The 2-hour lesson is built for first-timers and the basics; the 1-hour is a quick fix when one thing's nagging you; the 4- and 6-hour sessions go deep on freestyle or carving. Not sure which fits? Message me.
For the 1- and 2-hour lessons, at the COLORS restaurant door in Flumserberg. For the 4- and 6-hour sessions we pick a meeting point together when you book.

Dress warm — layers, a waterproof jacket and trousers, gloves, goggles and a helmet (rentable with your gear). Add sunscreen and water; the alpine sun is stronger than it looks. Board and boots you rent at the resort.

items.q: What happens if the weather's bad?
items.a: We ride in most conditions — snow is the point. If I have to cancel because the cable cars are down, the slopes are closed or the avalanche risk is unsafe, you rebook to another date at no charge or take a full cash refund.

Cancel at least 48 hours before the lesson and you get a credit valid for a year, usable on any future booking. Inside 48 hours, or a no-show, forfeits the fee. If you're ill or injured with a medical certificate, call me — I'll sort a credit regardless of the window.

items.q: Can we ride somewhere other than Flumserberg?
items.a: On the full-day lesson, yes — we can ride other resorts in the canton of St. Gallen. Arrange it with me first so we plan the day and the meeting point together.
Card, TWINT, Apple Pay or Google Pay — pick your method at checkout. Everything is handled securely, and the booking confirms the moment payment goes through.

items.q: Do I get my lesson filmed?
items.a: On the 4- and 6-hour sessions I film you as we ride and send the clips to your phone over WhatsApp afterwards. On the 2-hour lesson it's included once you're past the beginner stage.

faq.cta_body: Have a question I haven't answered here? Call or message me — I'd rather help you pick the right lesson than have you guess.
